title: NUB's QoL Mods
description: Small quality of life changes to make vanilla minecraft a little better
body:
# NUB's QoL Mods

A collection of quality of life improvements for Minecraft.

# Features

## Attack Through Non-Solid Blocks

Allows attacks to pass through non-solid blocks such as grass, tall grass, sugarcane, and flowers, targeting the mob behind or within these blocks. This is particularly useful in biomes with dense vegetation or when working with sugarcane farms.

![Hitting blaze through sugar cane](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6f2958cfa92dc5ec9142ec037305eff701f444a0.gif)

## Easy Elytra Takeoff

Simplifies elytra takeoff by allowing the player to right-click with a firework rocket to launch. This eliminates the need to double-tap the space bar for takeoff, making flight initiation more efficient.

![Easy elytra launch in action](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c7aa73a5c568d23ca5e71defdaa0799afb46c6b1.gif)

## Protect Stems While Using an Axe

Prevents the destruction of pumpkin and melon stems when holding an axe. This feature is beneficial for manual pumpkin and melon farming, ensuring stems are not accidentally broken during harvesting.

![Protect stems in action](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8c901310f395674641f983af7d181bb31b3c5533.gif)
